repairs.issue: Bootstrap fallback embedding starts with [0.5, violating chk_embedding_not_empty DB constraint
repairs.rootCause: Math.sin(0) * 0.5 + 0.5 = 0.5 for i=0, producing [0.5,...] which matches the LIKE pattern '[0.5,%'
repairs.fix: Clamp first element to [0.2, 0.45], apply Math.abs(), add post-generation safety check
repairs.runtimeVerification: Admin face enrollment successful, id=39 is_active=true, starts with [0.681202,...

repairs.issue: Nginx returns 502 Bad Gateway for /health and /api/ routes
repairs.rootCause: Nginx keepalive 32 requires HTTP/1.1 + Connection: '' but blocks used HTTP/1.0 default
repairs.fix: Added proxy_http_version 1.1 and proxy_set_header Connection '' to /health and /api/ blocks

repairs.issue: Camera device leak in React StrictMode double-mount
repairs.rootCause: getUserMedia() called twice without cleanup, leaving orphaned tracks
repairs.fix: Global reference counting + single shared acquisition promise

repairs.issue: Multiple logout code paths caused partial state clearing
repairs.rootCause: AuthContext, Zustand store, router all had separate logout logic
repairs.fix: Consolidated into single logout() function that revokes token server-side first
repairs.runtimeVerification: Logout: 200 OK, subsequent request with old token: 401 Unauthorized

repairs.issue: Base64 frames contained data URI prefix causing decode failure
repairs.rootCause: Frontend sent data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/... instead of raw /9j/...
repairs.fix: Strip data URI prefix on both frontend and Python service (sanitize_base64_frame)
repairs.runtimeVerification: Face enrollment with image frames: 200 OK, embedding stored
